exphardcore.screen.name_entry.title: Set Character Name
exphardcore.screen.name_entry.label: Name
exphardcore.commands.exphardcore.name_se: Set current name for user %s to %s.
exphardcore.commands.exphardcore.name_ch: You do not have permission to change your name after you have set it.
exphardcore.commands.exphardcore.name_se: You do not have permission to set another player's name.
exphardcore.commands.exphardcore.history: You do not have permission to view another player's respawn history.
exphardcore.commands.exphardcore.loadout: Gave a random starting loadout to %s.
exphardcore.commands.spawnpoint.disabled: Setting a respawn point is disabled.
effect.exphardcore.quirk.frail.desc: Your max health is a little lower.
effect.exphardcore.quirk.airless.desc: Your oxygen is reduced when underwater.
effect.exphardcore.quirk.weak.desc: Your attacks deal a little less damage.
effect.exphardcore.quirk.heavy_boned.des: Falls hit harder and leave you dazed.
effect.exphardcore.quirk.paranoia.desc: You think you hear things, sometimes...
exphardcore.config.respawn.minDistanceFr: Only used if respawnCenter is not set to LAST_RESPAWN_POINT
exphardcore.config.respawn.respawnDistri: Only used if respawnDistribution is set to MIDPOINT_MORE_LIKELY. Distance from the center where respawns are more likely to happen. Set to -1 to use the halfway point between respawnRadiusMin and respawnRadiusMax.
exphardcore.config.main.replacePlayerMod: Replace the player model every life
exphardcore.config.main.enableLifeQuirks: Give each new character a random minor quirk
exphardcore.config.main.quirkChance.name: Quirk chance
exphardcore.config.main.quirkChance.comm: Chance (0-1) that a new character gets a quirk
